title: [MTR4] Bombardier Movia BM21
description: Bucharest Metro train Bombardier Movia BM21 for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
# **[MTR 4 Only]**
Romania Mentioned!!

This resource pack contains Bombardier Movia 346 (Bucharest Metro BM21) from Bucharest, Romania.
The pack contains the end and middle carriages of the train.
In the future there will be more Bucharest Metro things added.

There are some issues with the gangways having a gap but that will be fixed soon, alongside bogie models and destination boards added.
